ops.title: Add KindYAML support to cc-guides
ops.description: Extend cc-guides kind system (guide/kind.go, marker.go, artifact.go, internal/cli/lint.go, docs, tests) so `.yaml`/`.yml` targets render as sh-style concatenation with `# ` markers. First phase of the prek rendered-config program (plan: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/ccx-vcs-ship-should-declarative-turing.md). Must be RELEASED (main push auto-tags) before cc-skills yaml fragments land.

ops.text: task test && task lint green in ~/Code/cc-guides with KindYAML rendering + lint + clobber-guard tests
new cc-guides release published and brew upgrade picks it up
